abp_assumptions.A7: Brand review scores maintain ≥4.0 average across portfolio — no systemic decline

hedging_actions: Activate 48-hour guest recovery protocol for any property hitting 3.8 or below
Weekly sentiment dashboard review with VP Operations and VP Marketing
Pre-approved crisis communication templates for viral social media events

indicators.name: Portfolio review score velocity
indicators.description: Rate of change in guest review scores (TripAdvisor + Google) across portfolio
indicators.recommendation: 2 propert(ies) at or below 4.0 — GM coaching and service recovery plan needed.

indicators.name: Lowest score property — RAD025
indicators.description: Property with the lowest average review score across all platforms
indicators.recommendation: Property RAD025 (Netherlands) avg 3.75 — velocity -0.15 pts vs 3 months ago.

indicators.name: Negative sentiment theme clusters
indicators.description: Complaint theme clusters showing significant YoY growth in negative mentions
indicators.recommendation: 8 negative themes surging ≥80% YoY — systemic service failures require immediate COO escalation.

indicators.name: Top negative theme — Room size
indicators.description: Fastest-growing negative guest complaint theme across portfolio
indicators.recommendation: Theme 'Room size' at RAD025 (Netherlands): "Rooms tiny for the price — barely space for luggage"

indicators.name: Press coverage sentiment
indicators.description: Volume and sentiment of press articles mentioning Radisson brand
indicators.recommendation: 5/12 articles negative (41.7%) — press sentiment crisis; PR response team activation required.

indicators.name: Social media negative signals
indicators.description: Negative mentions, viral content and engagement decline on social platforms
indicators.recommendation: 1 viral negative social media event(s) detected — immediate crisis response required.

indicators.name: Viral event — RAD022
indicators.description: Highest-view negative social media video/post currently active
indicators.recommendation: Viral negative content at RAD022 (Italy) — 450,000 views on TikTok.
